description: Replay scenario based on real public data streams from August 15, 2018. Prahari agents process these signals exactly as they would have appeared that morning.

data.title: Water level rising in Kuttanad area
data.body: My uncle called from Pulinkunnu, water entering houses since early morning. Anyone else seeing this? The rain hasn't stopped since yesterday night.
data.author: keralite_2018

data.title: Pampa river water level dangerous - anyone near Pathanamthitta?
data.body: Dam water being released, heard sirens near Ranni. People near the river should evacuate immediately. This is serious.
data.author: flood_update_kl

data.title: ആലപ്പുഴയിൽ കനത്ത മഴ; വെള്ളപ്പൊക്ക ഭീഷണി
data.title_en: Heavy rain in Alappuzha; flood threat
data.description: ആലപ്പുഴ ജില്ലയിൽ കനത്ത മഴ തുടരുന്നു. കുട്ടനാട്ടിൽ വെള്ളപ്പൊക്ക ഭീഷണി ശക്തമായി. നിരവധി വീടുകളിൽ വെള്ളം കയറി.

data.title: Kerala flooding situation getting worse - help needed
data.body: Multiple districts affected. Alappuzha, Pathanamthitta, Ernakulam all reporting water logging. Military needs to be called in. People are stranded.
data.author: india_floods_update

data.reasoning: 3 independent source types reporting crisis signals from Alappuzha district within 2-hour window. Initiating correlation analysis.

Weather data confirms extreme rainfall (94mm/3h). Reddit posts corroborate with eyewitness reports from Kuttanad. Mathrubhumi news headline confirms flood threat. Google Search grounding: IMD orange alert active for Alappuzha.

High confidence flood threat in Alappuzha district. 3 independent sources agree. Rainfall at 94mm/3h far exceeds alert threshold. Reddit eyewitness reports confirm ground-level flooding. Mathrubhumi reports flood threat official. Publishing threat assessment.
Threat received. Initiating pre-staged volunteer matching. Searching for: boat operators, first aid, swimming capability within 15km of Alappuzha.

14 volunteers pre-matched. 8 with boat operation skills (critical for Kuttanad backwater flooding), 4 with medical training, 2 logistics coordinators. All speak Malayalam. Average distance 4.2km from crisis center.

data.headline: Flooding reported in parts of Alappuzha district
data.note: This is when the general public first learned about the crisis through mainstream media

data.advisory: Red alert issued for Alappuzha, Pathanamthitta, and Ernakulam districts
data.note: Official government response begins. By this time, Prahari would have had 14 volunteers mobilized for 2 hours.
